requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (Peru NTP-IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（秘鲁 NTP-IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（秘魯 NTP-IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Peru references IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems) through the corresponding INACAL NTP adoption as the technical method for classifying the photobiological risk group of LED lamps and luminaires. Risk groups range from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk), determined by blue-light-weighted radiance/irradiance limits. Unlike the EU, Peru does NOT have a horizontal regulation that automatically makes a documented photobiological risk-group classification a precondition to market access for all luminaires, and it does NOT require a blue-light-hazard class to be printed on the consumer energy label (there is no Peruvian equivalent of the EU Delegated Reg 2019/2015 Annex VI blue-light label). Where a specific Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares the category in scope, NTP-IEC 62471 conformity can become a mandatory condition; otherwise it serves as a reference safety method that prudent exporters still document. RG2/RG3 products should carry warnings and usage restrictions as a matter of product safety.
summary.zh: 秘鲁通过相应的 INACAL NTP 采用版本引用 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），作为对 LED 灯及灯具光生物危险组别进行分类的技术方法。危险组别从 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险），由蓝光加权辐亮度/辐照度限值确定。与欧盟不同，秘鲁并没有一项横向法规自动将书面化的光生物危险组别分类作为所有灯具的市场准入前提，也不要求在消费者能效标识上印制蓝光危害等级（没有相当于欧盟授权法规 2019/2015 附件 VI 蓝光标识的秘鲁制度）。当特定技术规范（Reglamento Tecnico，PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布该类别纳入范围时，NTP-IEC 62471 符合性可成为强制条件；否则其作为审慎出口商仍应记录的参考安全方法。RG2/RG3 产品应作为产品安全事项附带警告及使用限制。
summary.zht: 秘魯通過相應的 INACAL NTP 採用版本引用 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），作為對 LED 燈及燈具光生物危險組別進行分類的技術方法。危險組別從 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險），由藍光加權輻亮度/輻照度限值確定。與歐盟不同，秘魯並沒有一項橫向法規自動將書面化的光生物危險組別分類作為所有燈具的市場准入前提，也不要求在消費者能效標識上印製藍光危害等級（沒有相當於歐盟授權法規 2019/2015 附件 VI 藍光標識的秘魯制度）。當特定技術規範（Reglamento Tecnico，PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布該類別納入範圍時，NTP-IEC 62471 符合性可成為強制條件；否則其作為審慎出口商仍應記錄的參考安全方法。RG2/RG3 產品應作為產品安全事項附帶警告及使用限制。

standards_or_laws: NTP-IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (INACAL adoption of IEC 62471)
Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) where the category is declared in scope

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited. China's mandatory energy label (China Energy Label under GB 30255) does not include a blue-light hazard class. Chinese GB/T 20145 test reports are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence, but the shared IEC 62471 base means the classification method overlaps.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制，对居民灯具的执行有限。中国强制能效标识（GB 30255 下的中国能效标识）不包含蓝光危害等级。中国 GB/T 20145 检测报告不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据，但因共用 IEC 62471 基础，分类方法重叠。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制，對居民燈具的執行有限。中國強制能效標識（GB 30255 下的中國能效標識）不包含藍光危害等級。中國 GB/T 20145 檢測報告不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據，但因共用 IEC 62471 基礎，分類方法重疊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard; aligned with IEC 62471)

gap.en: Peru and China both build on IEC 62471 for risk-group classification, so the technical method overlaps. Differences: (1) neither market has an EU-style horizontal mandate that automatically requires a documented risk-group classification for all luminaires — in China GB/T 20145 is recommended-only; in Peru NTP-IEC 62471 is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the category in scope; (2) crucially, Peru has NO blue-light-hazard class printed on the consumer label — there is no Peruvian counterpart to the EU Delegated Reg 2019/2015 Annex VI blue-light label, so Chinese manufacturers do NOT face the EU-style label-artwork burden when exporting to Peru; (3) Chinese GB/T 20145 reports are not accepted as Peruvian evidence — where classification is needed, an NTP/IEC 62471 (ideally CB/accredited) report should be prepared; (4) RG2/RG3 products should still carry safety warnings as good practice. The net effect: photobiological documentation is a lighter obligation for Peru than for the EU, but still a prudent safety record to hold, and mandatory where a specific technical regulation requires it.
gap.zh: 秘鲁与中国均以 IEC 62471 进行危险组别分类，技术方法重叠。差异：（1）两市场均无欧盟式横向强制要求对所有灯具自动进行书面化危险组别分类——中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性；秘鲁 NTP-IEC 62471 仅在技术规范宣布该类别纳入范围时为强制；（2）关键在于，秘鲁没有在消费者标识上印制蓝光危害等级——没有相当于欧盟授权法规 2019/2015 附件 VI 蓝光标识的秘鲁制度，故中国制造商出口秘鲁时不面临欧盟式标识设计负担；（3）中国 GB/T 20145 报告不被接受为秘鲁证据——在需要分类时，应准备 NTP/IEC 62471（最好为 CB/经认可）报告；（4）RG2/RG3 产品仍应作为良好实践附带安全警告。总体而言：光生物文件对秘鲁而言较欧盟更轻，但仍为应持有的审慎安全记录，并在特定技术规范要求时为强制。
gap.zht: 秘魯與中國均以 IEC 62471 進行危險組別分類，技術方法重疊。差異：（1）兩市場均無歐盟式橫向強制要求對所有燈具自動進行書面化危險組別分類——中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性；秘魯 NTP-IEC 62471 僅在技術規範宣布該類別納入範圍時為強制；（2）關鍵在於，秘魯沒有在消費者標識上印製藍光危害等級——沒有相當於歐盟授權法規 2019/2015 附件 VI 藍光標識的秘魯制度，故中國製造商出口秘魯時不面臨歐盟式標識設計負擔；（3）中國 GB/T 20145 報告不被接受為秘魯證據——在需要分類時，應準備 NTP/IEC 62471（最好為 CB/經認可）報告；（4）RG2/RG3 產品仍應作為良好實踐附帶安全警告。總體而言：光生物文件對秘魯而言較歐盟更輕，但仍為應持有的審慎安全記錄，並在特定技術規範要求時為強制。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — NTP-IEC 62471 risk-group classification is the technical method and becomes mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the category in scope; Peru has NO blue-light-hazard class on the consumer label (no equivalent to EU Delegated Reg 2019/2015 Annex VI)
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; no blue-light hazard class on the China Energy Label

source.publisher: INACAL (Instituto Nacional de Calidad) — Gobierno del Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru classifies photobiological risk via NTP-IEC 62471, mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the category in scope. Unlike the EU, Peru has NO blue-light-hazard class on the consumer label (no equivalent to EU Delegated Reg 2019/2015 Annex VI), so Chinese exporters avoid that EU-specific labelling burden. The IEC 62471 method is shared with China's recommended-only GB/T 20145, but Chinese reports are not accepted as Peruvian evidence — prepare an NTP/IEC 62471 (ideally CB/accredited) report where classification is needed, and carry RG2/RG3 warnings as good practice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁通过 NTP-IEC 62471 进行光生物危险分类，仅在技术规范宣布该类别纳入范围时为强制。与欧盟不同，秘鲁没有在消费者标识上印制蓝光危害等级（无相当于欧盟授权法规 2019/2015 附件 VI 的制度），故中国出口商可避免该欧盟特有标识负担。IEC 62471 方法与中国仅为推荐性的 GB/T 20145 共用，但中国报告不被接受为秘鲁证据——在需要分类时请准备 NTP/IEC 62471（最好为 CB/经认可）报告，并作为良好实践附带 RG2/RG3 警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯通過 NTP-IEC 62471 進行光生物危險分類，僅在技術規範宣布該類別納入範圍時為強制。與歐盟不同，秘魯沒有在消費者標識上印製藍光危害等級（無相當於歐盟授權法規 2019/2015 附件 VI 的制度），故中國出口商可避免該歐盟特有標識負擔。IEC 62471 方法與中國僅為推薦性的 GB/T 20145 共用，但中國報告不被接受為秘魯證據——在需要分類時請準備 NTP/IEC 62471（最好為 CB/經認可）報告，並作為良好實踐附帶 RG2/RG3 警告。

requirement_topic.en: Smart / Wireless Luminaire Radio Approval (Peru MTC Homologation)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能 / 无线灯具无线电核准（秘鲁 MTC 型号核准）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能 / 無線燈具無線電核准（秘魯 MTC 型號核准）

summary.en: Any LED luminaire incorporating a radio transmitter (smart lighting with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or similar) requires homologation (homologacion de equipos) by Peru's MTC (Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones) before being marketed or imported. MTC homologation verifies that the radio device operates within Peru's spectrum allocations and technical limits; it is typically obtained by an in-country importer/representative who submits the technical documentation (commonly leveraging internationally recognised radio test reports). This radio approval is in addition to the electrical-safety (NTP-IEC 60598 / 61347-2-13) and any applicable MINEM energy-label and NTP-CISPR 15 obligations. Devices must operate on the bands and power limits authorised in Peru — band plans differ from China, so a device tuned only to Chinese allocations must be confirmed against Peruvian spectrum rules.
summary.zh: 任何含无线电发射机的 LED 灯具（具备 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或类似功能的智能照明）在营销或进口前，须经秘鲁 MTC（交通通信部）型号核准（homologacion de equipos）。MTC 型号核准核实无线电设备在秘鲁的频谱分配及技术限值内运行；通常由当地进口商/代表提交技术文件（常借助国际认可的无线电检测报告）办理。该无线电核准是在电气安全（NTP-IEC 60598/61347-2-13）及任何适用的 MINEM 能效标识与 NTP-CISPR 15 义务之外的额外要求。设备须在秘鲁授权的频段及功率限值内运行——频段规划与中国不同，故仅按中国分配调谐的设备须对照秘鲁频谱规则核实。
summary.zht: 任何含無線電發射機的 LED 燈具（具備 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或類似功能的智能照明）在營銷或進口前，須經秘魯 MTC（交通通信部）型號核准（homologacion de equipos）。MTC 型號核准核實無線電設備在秘魯的頻譜分配及技術限值內運行；通常由當地進口商/代表提交技術文件（常借助國際認可的無線電檢測報告）辦理。該無線電核准是在電氣安全（NTP-IEC 60598/61347-2-13）及任何適用的 MINEM 能效標識與 NTP-CISPR 15 義務之外的額外要求。設備須在秘魯授權的頻段及功率限值內運行——頻段規劃與中國不同，故僅按中國分配調諧的設備須對照秘魯頻譜規則核實。

standards_or_laws: MTC homologacion de equipos y aparatos de telecomunicaciones — Peru radio/telecom equipment homologation regime (Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones)
Peruvian spectrum allocation rules (MTC) for ISM/short-range device bands

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires (smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Committee) type approval, in addition to CCC where the luminaire is in CCC scope. SRRC verifies the radio module against Chinese spectrum allocations and power limits. SRRC type approval is issued under the Chinese regulatory system and is not recognised for Peru — a separate MTC homologation is required. China's spectrum band plan (e.g., specific sub-GHz allocations) differs from Peru's, so a module certified only for China may need parameter changes or re-confirmation for Peruvian bands.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线功能灯具（具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED）须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，并在灯具属 CCC 范围内时叠加 CCC。SRRC 核实无线电模块是否符合中国频谱分配及功率限值。SRRC 型号核准系在中国监管体系下出具，不被秘鲁认可——须另行取得 MTC 型号核准。中国频谱频段规划（如特定 sub-GHz 分配）与秘鲁不同，故仅获中国认证的模块可能须为秘鲁频段更改参数或重新确认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線功能燈具（具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED）須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，並在燈具屬 CCC 範圍內時疊加 CCC。SRRC 核實無線電模塊是否符合中國頻譜分配及功率限值。SRRC 型號核准系在中國監管體系下出具，不被秘魯認可——須另行取得 MTC 型號核准。中國頻譜頻段規劃（如特定 sub-GHz 分配）與秘魯不同，故僅獲中國認證的模塊可能須為秘魯頻段更改參數或重新確認。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China (State Radio Regulation Committee)

gap.en: Both Peru (MTC homologation) and China (SRRC type approval) require radio approval for smart/wireless luminaires, but the approvals are separate and non-mutual — Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy Peru's MTC homologation. Key gaps: (1) MTC homologation is typically filed by the in-country importer/representative; the manufacturer must supply technical documentation and, commonly, internationally recognised radio test reports; (2) Peruvian spectrum band plans and power limits differ from China's, so a module tuned only to Chinese allocations must be confirmed (and possibly adjusted) for Peruvian bands; (3) MTC homologation is additional to the electrical-safety NTP conformity and any MINEM energy-label obligation — it does not replace them; (4) there is no single combined CE-style declaration in Peru, so radio approval, safety conformity, and energy labelling are handled as separate workstreams. For non-wireless (conventional) LED luminaires, MTC homologation does not apply at all.
gap.zh: 秘鲁（MTC 型号核准）与中国（SRRC 型号核准）均对智能/无线灯具要求无线电核准，但核准各自独立、不互认——中国 SRRC 核准不满足秘鲁 MTC 型号核准。主要差距：（1）MTC 型号核准通常由当地进口商/代表提交；制造商须提供技术文件，并通常提供国际认可的无线电检测报告；（2）秘鲁频谱频段规划及功率限值与中国不同，故仅按中国分配调谐的模块须为秘鲁频段确认（并可能调整）；（3）MTC 型号核准是在电气安全 NTP 合格评定及任何 MINEM 能效标识义务之外的额外要求——不予替代；（4）秘鲁没有单一合并的 CE 式声明，故无线电核准、安全合格评定及能效标识作为各自独立的工作流处理。对于非无线（常规）LED 灯具，MTC 型号核准完全不适用。
gap.zht: 秘魯（MTC 型號核准）與中國（SRRC 型號核准）均對智能/無線燈具要求無線電核准，但核准各自獨立、不互認——中國 SRRC 核准不滿足秘魯 MTC 型號核准。主要差距：（1）MTC 型號核准通常由當地進口商/代表提交；製造商須提供技術文件，並通常提供國際認可的無線電檢測報告；（2）秘魯頻譜頻段規劃及功率限值與中國不同，故僅按中國分配調諧的模塊須為秘魯頻段確認（並可能調整）；（3）MTC 型號核准是在電氣安全 NTP 合格評定及任何 MINEM 能效標識義務之外的額外要求——不予替代；（4）秘魯沒有單一合並的 CE 式聲明，故無線電核准、安全合格評定及能效標識作為各自獨立的工作流處理。對於非無線（常規）LED 燈具，MTC 型號核准完全不適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — MTC homologation required before marketing/importing any luminaire incorporating a radio transmitter; not applicable to non-wireless luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — SRRC type approval required in China for wireless-enabled luminaires (plus CCC where in scope)

source.publisher: MTC (Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones) — Gobierno del Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/wireless LED luminaires sold in Peru require MTC homologation, separate from and not satisfied by China's SRRC type approval. The homologation is typically filed by the in-country importer using internationally recognised radio test reports, and the device must operate within Peruvian spectrum bands and power limits (which differ from China's). It is additional to NTP-IEC electrical-safety conformity and any MINEM energy-label obligation. Conventional non-wireless luminaires are out of MTC scope entirely.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在秘鲁销售的智能/无线 LED 灯具须取得 MTC 型号核准，其与中国 SRRC 型号核准相互独立且不被满足。该核准通常由当地进口商使用国际认可的无线电检测报告提交，设备须在秘鲁频谱频段及功率限值（与中国不同）内运行。其为 NTP-IEC 电气安全合格评定及任何 MINEM 能效标识义务之外的额外要求。常规非无线灯具完全不在 MTC 范围内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在秘魯銷售的智能/無線 LED 燈具須取得 MTC 型號核准，其與中國 SRRC 型號核准相互獨立且不被滿足。該核准通常由當地進口商使用國際認可的無線電檢測報告提交，設備須在秘魯頻譜頻段及功率限值（與中國不同）內運行。其為 NTP-IEC 電氣安全合格評定及任何 MINEM 能效標識義務之外的額外要求。常規非無線燈具完全不在 MTC 範圍內。
